name: Easy French Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 oz) sliced water chestnuts, drained
enough water to equal 1 1/3 cups with mushroom liquid
1 can (10 3/4 oz) French onion soup, defated
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a 2 quart casserole and mix well.
2. Cook, covered, in a 350 degree oven for one hour.
3. Remove from oven and let rest for 10 minutes.
